Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the immediate post-sale fulfillment. So this is our whole goal here is to maximize the first impression, reinforce the decision that they made to work with us. So right upon the sale, what we're going to want to do is one, schedule the next two appointments. That way you show that we are organized, we know exactly what's happening next in this process, they feel taken care of. And this is something that you should do for the rest of your life is that whenever you complete a sale, or whenever someone finishes a point in the process with you, they should always have the next point in the process scheduled at that point. Now you don't have to add another communication cycle in order to get something scheduled, which automatically makes it seem less important. When it's predetermined, it's always more important. So if you think about it, oh man, I've had this doctor appointment for five weeks now. I made this appointment six weeks ago. Automatically it's more important in your mind because you made it a longer time ago. And so don't be afraid of the fact that it's three weeks out. Once someone is a client, the longer out that you make the appointment, the more likely they are to actually show up, provided you give them a reminder. And so you want to make sure that you schedule their initial orientation, where you will be selling supplements and giving them their food plan for the first 14 days. And then the abandoned hope. And you want to make sure that you schedule both of those next appointments ahead of time. And if you want, you can make the abandoned hope at the halfway point, which would be Zoom optional, or you could do it at week two or week four. It's up to you, all right, where they would already be coming in for their bi-weekly meeting. All right, next, you want to send a handwritten card with some relevant details about their goals. So if you have notes, pumped, okay? So 30 minutes later, send them a video via Voxer, and that will also open up the line of communication, and they'll feel welcomed into the community. Make sure that they have a scale, and that you take them before and after pictures with your Voxer, that they basically, you want them to have a scale, and then they can text you before and after pictures in more scantily clad clothing if they feel more comfortable with it. Or you can take them at the nutrition orientation, which I send them a handwritten card, Voxer them with a personal video, and make sure they have the materials they need to start, which most times will be a scale and or a pedometer. If you want to really over deliver it, you can send those things to them for 15 bucks, and they will be really grateful that you did. All right, and then add them to the six-week group on Facebook so that you, so they can start interacting with other clients before they even come in, and that helps reinforce the sale.
